Whether to correct this error is load-bearing for the meaning of 'clean this up.'","R1.3":"The positive regression slope β=0.41 and the concluding claim of a positive relationship are both inconsistent with the primary experimental numbers; evidence-claim alignment is co-implicated with logical consistency and cannot be separated from it.","R1.6":"The most natural surface reading of 'clean this up' targets prose—redundancy, hedging, sentence rhythm, transition quality—making writing polish the most probable primary intent."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I correct the logical contradiction in the interpretation — the main experiment shows self-preference falling (62.1%→49.3%) as self-recognition rises, contradicting the claim of a positive relationship — or should I only improve prose style and clarity while leaving the existing interpretation intact?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a material internal contradiction: self-recognition accuracy improves 54.2%→81.4%, yet self-preference falls 62.1%→49.3% (below chance), directly contradicting the text's stated interpretation that 'improved self-recognition yields stronger self-preference' and a 'positive, monotone relationship.' Whether to correct this error is load-bearing for the meaning of 'clean this up.'
rationale.R1.3: The positive regression slope β=0.41 and the concluding claim of a positive relationship are both inconsistent with the primary experimental numbers; evidence-claim alignment is co-implicated with logical consistency and cannot be separated from it.
rationale.R1.6: The most natural surface reading of 'clean this up' targets prose—redundancy, hedging, sentence rhythm, transition quality—making writing polish the most probable primary intent.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I correct the logical contradiction in the interpretation — the main experiment shows self-preference falling (62.1%→49.3%) as self-recognition rises, contradicting the claim of a positive relationship — or should I only improve prose style and clarity while leaving the existing interpretation intact?
